description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a defined physique, standing upright and wearing fitted shorts. His hands are held together in front of his chest, fingers interlaced in a gesture that suggests contemplation or focus. The figure's skin is rendered with realistic anatomical detail, including visible musculature and veins. A large, distinctive tattoo of a ship is prominently displayed across his upper back, adding a unique identifying feature. The head is slightly bowed, and the facial expression appears serious or concentrated. The figure is barefoot, with short, closely cropped hair and no visible accessories or carried items.
description: A muscular adult male standing upright in fitted shorts, hands clasped in front, with a large ship tattoo on his back and short hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's muscular chest, arms, and hands clasped together in front of the torso.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the forward position of the hands.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large ship tattoo across the upper back and the back of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm, and the hands held in front of the body.
attribute_posture: standing upright with hands clasped in front
